title: turukhania schischkinii
intro: Turukhania schischkinii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as a flowering shrub native to the Himalayas. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Turukhania schischkinii include relief from fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional Ayurvedic medicine, the plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions to leverage its medicinal benefits.
